name: Fourier Conjugate Pair Study
hypothesis: Higgins Decomposition preserves Fourier conjugate structure — predictable relationships between f(t) and F(ω) on the simplex.
method: 12 known Fourier pairs, each side embedded as 3-part composition [|g|, |g'|, residual], run through canonical 12-step pipeline.

steps.step1_system: EXP-19-01T: Fourier Pair 01: rect(t): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-01F: Fourier Pair 01: sinc(f): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-02T: Fourier Pair 02: tri(t): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-02F: Fourier Pair 02: sinc²(f): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-03T: Fourier Pair 03: Gauss(t): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-03F: Fourier Pair 03: Gauss(f): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-04T: Fourier Pair 04: exp(-|t|): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-04F: Fourier Pair 04: Lorentz(f): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-05T: Fourier Pair 05: δ(t)≈narrow: 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-05F: Fourier Pair 05: const(f): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-06T: Fourier Pair 06: cos(2πf₀t): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-06F: Fourier Pair 06: δ-pair(f): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-07T: Fourier Pair 07: shah(t): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-07F: Fourier Pair 07: shah(f): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-08T: Fourier Pair 08: sech(πt): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-08F: Fourier Pair 08: sech(πf): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-09T: Fourier Pair 09: exp(-t)·u(t): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-09F: Fourier Pair 09: |1/(a+2πif)|: 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-10T: Fourier Pair 10: sinc²(t): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-10F: Fourier Pair 10: tri(f): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-11T: Fourier Pair 11: J₀(2πt): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-11F: Fourier Pair 11: 1/√(1-f²): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-12T: Fourier Pair 12: chirp(t): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
EXP-19-12F: Fourier Pair 12: chirp(f): 3-part simplex, carriers=['Signal', 'Derivative', 'Residual']
